title: Phase 1 validate-then-write + single-transaction atomicity in space_set is correct and should be defended
description: update_space_fully wraps prop updates and all member ops in one SQLite transaction. A future contributor might suggest splitting it back into separate update_space_props + upsert_space_member_with_role calls for simplicity. Reject: RFC 8620 §7.1 requires that if any write fails, the entire update must be notUpdated with no side effects. The old code had a window where name was committed before member ops were checked. The transaction is the correct fix and the added complexity is load-bearing.
close_reason: Design decision recorded in issue description; no code change needed
